title: reseda suffruticosa subsp. macrostachya
intro: Reseda suffruticosa subsp. macrostachya, also known as the tall reed mignonette, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Reseda suffruticosa subsp. macrostachya include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be used to treat various ailments.
